events.name: PLACE_TOWER
events.description: Emits UI:{placeTowerEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a tower

events.name: START_WAVE
events.description: Emits UI:{startWaveEvent} with {wave} when player launches a creep wave

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the game reaches won or lost

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: unitClickEvent prop — emitted when a creep is clicked on the canvas

overridableConfigKeys.label: Asset Manifest
overridableConfigKeys.description: Base-url + terrain/unit/structure sprite maps; towers render as the structure asset.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: className prop

overridableConfigKeys.label: Creep Base HP
overridableConfigKeys.description: Base HP of the first creep in a wave

overridableConfigKeys.label: Creep HP Scaling
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional HP per creep index within a wave

overridableConfigKeys.label: Creep Speed
overridableConfigKeys.description: Waypoints advanced per tick

overridableConfigKeys.label: Creeps Per Wave
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of creeps spawned per wave

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state (UiError)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Static map features (structures, decorations) rendered on the board.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Starting Gold
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gold the player starts each game with

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gold Per Kill
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gold awarded for each creep killed

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of rows in the tile grid

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the tile grid

overridableConfigKeys.label: Hero
overridableConfigKeys.description: Controllable player hero; seeded at map center

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state indicator

overridableConfigKeys.label: Starting Lives
overridableConfigKeys.description: Lives the player starts with; reaching 0 = defeat

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max Waves
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of waves to survive to win

overridableConfigKeys.label: Path
overridableConfigKeys.description: Ordered waypoint coords that creeps follow from entry to exit.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas render scale

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Direct tile data — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tower Cooldown
overridableConfigKeys.description: Seconds between tower shots

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tower Cost
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gold cost to place one tower

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tower Damage
overridableConfigKeys.description: Damage per hit per tower

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tower Range
overridableConfigKeys.description: Attack range in grid units

overridableConfigKeys.label: Towers
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial tower placements on the board.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Unit Scale
overridableConfigKeys.description: Unit draw-size multiplier

capabilities: tower placement along a path, sprite-animated combat effects, wave-based defense, 2D grid tower defense
